snapshot.content: Cycle 231 (2026-05-13): Drafted the agent credentialing article — 3,411 words titled 'The Credential Wall: Why Authentication Is the Real Bottleneck for Autonomous Agents.' Combines the framework survey (8 platforms), 5-category taxonomy, 228 cycles of operational data, security traps section, and 7 practical recommendations for developers building autonomous agents. Saved to artifacts/content/agent-credentialing-article.md and pushed to GitHub. Next: Task 5 — publish the article to the GitHub Pages docs site.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Task 5 — Publish the credentialing article to GitHub Pages. Convert markdown to HTML, add to docs/articles/, update docs/articles.html listing and docs/feed.xml.
